name: Baked Noodles with Spinach & Yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Gradually add noodles and salt to rapidly boiling water so that the water continues to boil; cook, uncovered, stirring occasionally, until tender.
2. Drain noodles in a colander.
3. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Combine yogurt and cottage cheese in a bowl.
5. In another bowl, combine cooked noodles, thawed spinach, and chopped onions with the yogurt and cottage cheese mixture.
6. Pour the noodle and vegetable mixture into a 1-quart baking dish.
7. Top with shredded cheddar cheese.
8. Cover with foil and bake for 20-25 minutes.
9. Remove the cover and continue to bake until the cheese is melted and lightly browned.
